bio: Ronald is another recently dumped cat who has joined our group. He’s very friendly and affectionate, and we would love to find him a safe, loving home. We didin't see  him much at first, which suggests he was finding his way around and choosing where he felt most safe. He gets on with the other cats in his area.
location: In the Park area downstairs from Al Maya in Cluster Q close to the feeding station
breed: Arabian Mau/Black with a little White
